events.connection.authparameters.CfnAbou: Contains the authorization parameters to use for the connection.

events.connection.authparameters.ApiKeyA.Description: The API Key parameters to use for authorization.

events.connection.authparameters.BasicAu.Description: The authorization parameters for Basic authorization.

events.connection.authparameters.Invocat.Description: Additional parameters for the connection that are passed through with every invocation to the HTTP endpoint.

events.connection.authparameters.OAuthPa.Description: The OAuth parameters to use for authorization.
